name: watch-video-ai
phrases: watch this video and tell me

steps.prompt: You are reviewing a short video clip for an OSINT case. Below is what the local tools extracted: the transcript (what is SAID) and becky-validate's observations (what is SEEN and HEARD). In 5 bullet points, state only what is supported by that evidence: who/what is on screen, any places, names, or on-screen text, and anything worth a closer look. Do not speculate beyond the data.
